problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Combining Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
